tluaNumericFor.tlua(46,10): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'i'.


==== tluaNumericFor.tlua (1 errors) ====
    function sumTo(n: number): number
      local total = 0;
      for i = 1, n do
        total = total + i;
      end
      return total;
    end
    
    // Optional step; the control variable may be assigned.
    function countDown(n: number): number
      local last = 0;
      for i = n, 1, -1 do
        last = i;
        i = i - 1;
      end
      return last;
    end
    
    // An annotation is allowed when it accepts a number.
    function annotated(n: number): number
      local total = 0;
      for i: number = 1, n do
        total = total + i;
      end
      return total;
    end
    
    // break works; nesting works; TS body statements work.
    function nested(w: number, h: number): number
      local count = 0;
      for x = 1, w do
        for y = 1, h do
          if (count > 100) {
            break;
          }
          count = count + 1;
        end
      end
      return count;
    end
    
    // The control variable is scoped to the loop.
    function scoped(n: number): number
      for i = 1, n do
      end
      return i;
             ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'i'.
    end
